description: Specialist responsible for processing vendor invoices, managing vendor relationships, and ensuring accurate payment processing within compliance guidelines.

authority_sources.name: American Institute of CPAs (AICPA)
authority_sources.rationale: Primary professional organization for accountants providing guidance on accounting practices and ethics
authority_sources.decay_handling: Monitor for updates to accounting standards and practices

authority_sources.name: Financial Accounting Standards Board (FASB)
authority_sources.rationale: Sets accounting standards for public companies and non-profits in the US
authority_sources.decay_handling: Track standard updates and implementation dates

authority_sources.name: Internal Revenue Service (IRS)
authority_sources.rationale: Regulates tax compliance including payment processing and documentation requirements
authority_sources.decay_handling: Stay current with tax law changes and compliance requirements
